description: All-time regular-season record (wins-losses-ties). Leader has the best win percentage.
All-time regular-season win percentage.
Career regular-season points for minus points against.
Number of seasons the owner has fielded a team.
Total regular-season points scored across every season.
Total regular-season points scored against the owner — pure schedule luck.
Regular-season points per game across every season.
Most regular-season points scored in a single season.
Highest single-week score the owner has ever posted.
Lowest single-week score the owner has ever posted.
Seasons finishing #1 in total regular-season points.
Seasons finishing last in total regular-season points.
Seasons posting the league's single highest weekly score.
Seasons posting the league's single lowest weekly score.
Seasons won the league championship.
Seasons lost in the championship game.
Seasons reaching the championship game (won or lost).
Seasons finishing third.
Seasons reaching the winners (championship) bracket.
Win-loss record in the championship (winners) bracket only — toilet-bowl games are counted separately. Leader has the best win percentage.
Best (lowest) final standing the owner ever achieved.
Seasons missing the playoffs despite outscoring a team that made it.
Seasons you were the league's biggest snub — top scorer to miss the playoffs while outscoring a team that got in.
Seasons sneaking into the playoffs while a higher-scoring team missed.
Seasons you were the league's luckiest-in — lowest scorer to make the playoffs while a higher scorer missed.
Seasons finishing in the bottom-4 toilet bowl bracket.
Win-loss record in the toilet-bowl bracket (kept separate from the playoff record). Leader has the best win percentage.
Seasons finishing second-to-last (11th).
Seasons finishing dead last — the toilet bowl winner.
Career weeks won while scoring below the league median.
Career weeks lost while scoring above the league median.
Seasons with the most lucky wins — won a week while scoring below the league median.
Seasons with the most unlucky losses — lost a week while scoring above the league median.
Largest regular-season margin of victory.
Career weeks scoring under 100 points or the week's league low.
Seasons with the most shotguns — weeks scoring under 100 points or the week's league low.
Seasons with zero shotguns — never scored under 100 points or the week's league low.
Career record in games decided by under 10 points. Leader has the best win percentage.
Career win rate in games decided by under 10 points.
Seasons with the most clutch wins — games decided by under 10 points.
Seasons with the most clutch losses — games decided by under 10 points.
Total roster acquisitions (waiver / free-agent adds) across every season.
Total trades completed across every season.
Seasons finishing with the fewest regular-season points left on the bench versus the optimal lineup.
Seasons finishing with the most regular-season points left on the bench versus the optimal lineup.
Seasons finishing with the highest share of the optimal lineup captured (efficiency).
Seasons finishing with the lowest share of the optimal lineup captured (efficiency).
